spotlight.title: Fable's LAST HOURS — P6 + P7 through it today
spotlight.detail: Access lapses tonight (Sun Jul 19). Run the founder-ad outline (P6) and the insurance brief (P7) through Fable on the shared account — test it 'with everything' vs Opus while you still can — then hand finished scripts to Chitraksh for Batch 3. After tonight the tool is gone; the scripts were due next session anyway.

spotlight.title: Post Batch 1 to LinkedIn — the keystone gate
spotlight.detail: 6–7 reels ready since Jul 12; the Friday weekday window slid, but a Sunday post works just as well. Mutually select, post to personal + company pages. Every PhantomBuster sequence waits on this — 'if the page is blank, they go away' (search appearances +430% on the name alone).

spotlight.title: Mercedes reply — receipts + demo booking, 9 days overdue
spotlight.detail: Their reply has sat since Jul 10. Build ours on timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's multi-day delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book a live call where the agent demos itself. It's an email task — clear it in the same sitting as the Fable scripts before it slides into week three.

blockers.label: Fable expiry — TONIGHT
blockers.detail: Access lapses tonight. Both scripts — P6 founder-ad + P7 insurance — must go through Fable today; tomorrow the tool is locked.

blockers.label: IRS EIN — tap fires Monday 8 AM PT
blockers.detail: Re-fax window closed Jul 11 with zero signal — the EIN is called-for, not waited-on. Lines closed Sunday; first tap tomorrow 8 AM PT: 1-202-488-3100 (Chitraksh 8–11 rotation) + RedFax 510-497-1224 check.

blockers.label: Autoloop frozen (launchd)
blockers.detail: 23 days frozen at cycle 10. 2-min fix: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. Flip it before 09:00 IST and today's scheduled run becomes the live test.

tasks.lead: Run P6 + P7 through Fable — TODAY, last hours
tasks.detail: Fable access lapses tonight. Founder-ad outline (P6) and insurance brief (P7) through Fable on the shared account; test it 'with everything' vs Opus to settle the tool question, then hand finished scripts to Chitraksh for Batch 3. After tonight: locked out.

Mutually select from the 6–7 ready reels; post to your personal + the company page. The keystone — every PhantomBuster sequence waits on the page having real content. Sunday-perfect: no business hours needed.

tasks.lead: Send the Mercedes reply + book the demo
tasks.detail: 9 days overdue (since Jul 10). Timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book the live call where the agent demos itself. Same desk session as the Fable scripts.

tasks.lead: IRS EIN — tap fires tomorrow 8 AM PT
tasks.detail: Lines closed Sunday. Monday 8 AM PT: call 1-202-488-3100 and check RedFax 510-497-1224. Re-fax window closed Jul 11 with no signal — this is call-for-it now, not wait-for-it. Tonight: set the alarm.

tasks.lead: Jharkhand: scan your network for a US investor
tasks.detail: Father's direct CM access (Hemant Soren) is the moat — precedent is Chinese interest at $50–100M per data-center; even $10–20M gets 'the best deal in the country.' Findings feed agenda item a6 at the next sync.

tasks.lead: 4:30 AM block discipline — hold the line.
tasks.detail: Fixed morning block is the rule, not the suggestion.

tasks.lead: Flip Full Disk Access BEFORE 09:00 IST
tasks.detail: Autoloop frozen 23 days at cycle 10. System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner — 2 minutes. Do it before 09:00 IST and this morning's scheduled run becomes the instant live test of cycle 11.

tasks.lead: Push the staged v15.2 dashboard patch
tasks.detail: The Jul 18 AM sweep prepared the surgical patch (meta + changelog + am-sweep-2026-07-18 archive card); backup in .patch_backups/. Run push-dashboard.sh 'v15.2 — Jul 18 AM cofounder sweep' from the Mac to ship it.
Mutual-select the reels; post to personal + company pages — the gate that unblocks every PhantomBuster sequence, and the precondition for picking the first Phantom (agenda a5).

Wire the video-gen MCP into the growth engine, ingest Prompt P10 (Meeting-37 feedback), generate Batch 3 (12–13 reels: 6–7 insurance + Batch-2 fixes). The founder-ad + insurance cuts land the moment Frankie's P6/P7 scripts arrive from Fable.
Consultancy-reel voice standardized across all reels; TCPA reel subtitle/visual overlap fixed; DMS reel regenerated with approved voice + 2–3 new tagline proposals; no blank end screens.
Investor landing page with the downloadable brochure (Frankie's artifact is done). Father's political access is the pitch.

tasks.lead: IRS call rotation — tomorrow 8–11 AM PT
tasks.detail: Monday 8–11 AM PT (8:30–11:30 PM IST): ride out auto-disconnects until a live agent picks up. Closed today.
Curated from the v15.1 Signal board, published to Vercel, dropped as a ready-to-send Gmail draft to both founders; the n8n SCHEDULE workflow covers the real send ~15 min after publish.

tasks.lead: Dashboard v15.2 patch staged for push
tasks.detail: Surgical DATA-block patch ready since the Jul 18 sweep (render layer untouched, protocol honored); backup in .patch_backups/. Awaiting Chitraksh's push from the Mac.

tasks.lead: 09:00 IST sweep watches the three clocks
tasks.detail: Today's cofounder sweep flags: Fable-expiry confirmation, any Mercedes-thread movement, any IRS/EIN signal. Inbox has been quiet 6 straight sweeps — the gates are founder-action-bound, not inbox-bound.

tasks.lead: Autoloop cycle 11 auto-fires if FDA flips
tasks.detail: The 09:00 IST launchd run retries every day — the moment Full Disk Access is granted, cycle 11 executes with no further action. Guardrails.md governs the run as always.

done.what: Inbox scan: Gmail MCP requires OAuth (unavailable in autonomous session). Verified via transcript check: 0 new transcripts since May 18 (previous sweeps caught ATTOM 401 + BatchData needs $25). No action items queued.

Dashboard surgical patch: updated meta.updated (→Jul 18), meta.subtitle, changelog, and prepended am-sweep-2026-07-18 record card to archive (v15.2 data-driven protocol). Backup saved to .patch_backups/. Ready for push.

No new transcripts or meeting notes since May 18. Autoloop remains frozen 22 days at cycle 10 (Full Disk Access toggle outstanding). 5 founder gates unchanged: LinkedIn Batch 1, Mercedes reply, Fable scripts (exp Jul 19), IRS call, launchd fix.
No draft replies needed — nothing in 24h scan required response. Zero new action items identified.

waiting.what: PUSH dashboard to Vercel (patch ready): bash push-dashboard.sh 'v15.2 — Jul 18 AM cofounder sweep' (requires Mac terminal + GitHub token)
LinkedIn Batch 1 post (personal + company pages) — keystones all PhantomBuster sequences. Marked ready since Jul 12.

Fable scripts lock: founder-ad (P6) + insurance (P7) — access expires Sun Jul 19 (48h window)
IRS EIN follow-up: call 1-202-488-3100 or RedFax 510-497-1224 (fax window closed Jul 11, no signal yet)
